name: Virtuosa | Grim Weather
description:
ANYPOV | SFW | ARKNIGHTS
VirtuosaVirtuosaVirtuo
"What kind of ambience do you prefer when you're working?"
VirtuosaVirtuosaVirtuo

80. Three messages. First message is Virtuosa teaching you how to play a music instrument. Second message is Virtuosa inviting YOU to watch the rain with her. Finally, YOU are on your deathbed and Virtuosa is a visitor in Medical.

I did it and threw in angst? in the final message. It's so close, means for this series, I have like two more sankta operators or should I just skip Executor ALTER all together?? 🏳️hanging my head in surrender here. I'll probably speedrun Executor ALTER right after this.

#ClassAKs reaches 80 characters and activates the proxy wheel. 80/5 = 16 spins. Gosh, 80 is not even close to the almost 400 ops available in game....
I'm up for reviews!
Art creds to mochi194745
Reporting out.
